title: Add Breadcrumb component
description: Create a Breadcrumb React component at src/components/ui/breadcrumb.tsx that renders a trail of links. Props: items: { label: string; href?: string }[]. Active item (last in array) renders as plain text, remaining items render as links. Include co-located unit test at src/components/ui/breadcrumb.test.tsx.
existing_patterns: src/components/board/PriorityBadge.tsx — simple UI component with props interface, 'use client' directive, CSS module
src/components/board/PriorityBadge.test.tsx — co-located test using @testing-library/react render/screen and vitest expect
